metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students advance foundational dance techniques toward intermediate-advanced competency. This course emphasizes continued technique refinement, deeper artistic exploration, and preparation for specialized dance study.
metadata.general_description: Advanced foundational dance course for continued technique development and artistic growth.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced foundational technique provides platform for specialized dance study and artistic expression.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students refine foundational skills to intermediate-advanced levels, creating capability for diverse dance specializations.

big_ideas.statement: Deepening technique connects to greater artistic expression and performance sophistication.
big_ideas.elaboration: As technical skills advance, dancers develop capacity for more nuanced artistic expression and interpretation.

big_ideas.statement: Continued technique development requires commitment, discipline, and deliberate practice.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students understand that skill refinement requires sustained effort and intentional focus on technical and artistic goals.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced foundational competency opens pathways to specialized study and professional development.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students with strong foundational skills can pursue advanced training in specific styles or begin professional dance work.

competencies.raw: Refine and advance foundational dance techniques
i_can_statements: I can execute foundational techniques with growing precision and control
I can demonstrate significant improvement in technical proficiency
I can move toward intermediate-advanced skill levels
I can apply techniques increasingly naturally in movement

competencies.raw: Explore advanced movement combinations and sequences
i_can_statements: I can learn and execute increasingly complex movement combinations
I can maintain control and fluidity in advanced sequences
I can combine multiple movement concepts in sophisticated ways
I can perform with growing artistry and confidence

competencies.raw: Develop artistic interpretation and performance quality
i_can_statements: I can perform with increasing artistic nuance and interpretation
I can bring emotional authenticity to movement
I can develop personal movement quality and presence
I can express increasingly sophisticated ideas through movement

competencies.raw: Specialize in areas of personal interest and strength
i_can_statements: I can identify areas of dance that resonate with my interests
I can develop deeper skills in styles of personal interest
I can explore specialized techniques and vocabularies
I can build foundation for potential specialized study

competencies.raw: Understand advanced movement principles and techniques
i_can_statements: I can explain more sophisticated technical and movement concepts
I can understand complex biomechanical principles
I can recognize and describe nuanced technique refinements
I can apply deeper understanding to my own movement

competencies.raw: Analyze performance and trajectory toward professional development
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my technical and artistic growth
I can assess readiness for specialized or professional study
I can identify strengths and areas for continued development
I can envision my potential as a developing dancer

competencies.raw: Understand diverse dance styles and their requirements
i_can_statements: I can understand technique and skill requirements of different styles
I can analyze how foundational skills apply across styles
I can recognize specializations available in dance field
I can consider which directions align with my interests

competencies.raw: Reflect on personal dance journey and future possibilities
i_can_statements: I can articulate how my understanding of dance has deepened
I can reflect on my artistic development and growth
I can consider various pathways in dance study and careers
I can envision myself as a developing or professional dancer

competencies.raw: Learn, remember, and execute complex movement material
i_can_statements: I can memorize and execute increasingly complex choreography
I can maintain accuracy across multiple rehearsals
I can apply feedback to refine technical execution
I can demonstrate consistent movement memory

competencies.raw: Communicate through refined movement and performance
i_can_statements: I can perform with greater presence and artistry
I can convey character and emotion through movement
I can engage audiences with developing performance skills
I can express myself authentically through dance

competencies.raw: Discuss dance and reflect on learning experiences
i_can_statements: I can discuss dance experiences and learning with sophistication
I can articulate my artistic growth and understanding
I can engage in meaningful conversations about dance
I can reflect thoughtfully on my dance practice

competencies.raw: Seek feedback and guidance for continued development
i_can_statements: I can ask informed questions about technique and artistry
I can receive and apply feedback constructively
I can seek guidance for specialized interests
I can communicate about my dance goals and aspirations

competencies.raw: Explore specialized dance styles and directions
i_can_statements: I can study and explore specialized dance styles more deeply
I can prepare for potential specialized or professional study
I can connect foundational skills to specialized vocabularies
I can develop expertise in areas of personal interest

competencies.raw: Connect dance to broader artistic and educational pathways
i_can_statements: I can understand pathways to higher education in dance
I can explore dance careers and professional opportunities
I can consider how dance integrates with other interests
I can envision various future directions involving dance

competencies.raw: Engage with professional dance and mentorship
i_can_statements: I can attend and critically engage with professional dance
I can learn from and interact with professional dancers
I can develop relationships with teachers and mentors
I can understand professional standards and expectations

competencies.raw: Prepare for continued development and growth
i_can_statements: I can commit to ongoing artistic development
I can plan for continued dance study and growth
I can develop discipline and practices supporting progress
I can see dance as lifelong practice or potential career

areas.name: Advanced Technique Development
topics: Refining foundational techniques toward intermediate-advanced levels
Increased complexity and precision in movement execution

areas.name: Artistic Development and Interpretation
topics: Developing personal movement quality and presence

areas.name: Exploration of Specialized Dance Interests
topics: Deepening study in styles of personal interest
Exploring different dance careers and specializations
Discovering unique artistic interests and strengths

areas.name: Professional Development and Future Pathways
topics: Planning for continued study and development
